name: FacesAtAnObtuseAngleException
summary: The FacesAtAnObtuseAngleException class represents an error when, faces to be connected are too steep of an angle.

constructors.name: FacesAtAnObtuseAngleException
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FacesAtAnObtuseAngleException class with "Faces to be connected are too steep of an angle" error message.
